title: Vežba 62

fillInTheBlank.sentence: It's a serious issue, and we need to BLANK it BLANK.

blanks.feedback: Hii ina maana ya kushughulikia au kuchukua hatua kutatua tatizo.
Hii ina maana ya kufanya jambo haraka au bila kuchelewa.

dialogue.text: It's a serious issue, and we need to address it quickly.

instructions: Poslušaj zvuk i dovrši rečenicu ispod.
explanation:
To address ina maana ya kuchukua hatua kushughulikia tatizo au hali fulani. Kwa mfano:

We need to address the login error before users report it. – Ovo znači da su potrebni preduzeti koraci za rešavanje problema.

Quickly inaonyesha jinsi jambo linavyofanywa kwa haraka. Quick, kwa upande mwingine, inaelezea tu jambo kuwa la haraka. Kwa mfano:

  • She responded quickly to the email. – Unatumia quickly kuelezea jinsi alivyotuma majibu kwa barua pepe kwa haraka.

  • It was a quick meeting. – Hapa, unaelezea mkutano wenyewe kama ulivyokuwa na muda mfupi na unaofaa.
